# Copilot Instructions

- Follow the repository-wide rules in `AGENTS.md`.
- For published documentation under `docs/**`, use the Editor standard from `docs/AGENTS.md` for tone, structure, clarity, examples, and review quality.
- Apply the same `docs/AGENTS.md` editorial standard to homepage content in `src/pages/index.tsx` and `src/components/landing/**`.
- When authoring new documentation, use the same quality bar and editorial judgment defined in `docs/AGENTS.md`, even when you are generating content instead of reviewing it.
- For code review and repository-wide changes, follow the review-routing and code-review instructions in `AGENTS.md`.
